name: SentinelNet
description: Autonomous agent reputation watchdog for ERC-8004 on Base. Discovers registered agents, analyzes their on-chain behavior across Base and Ethereum, computes 5-dimensional trust scores, publishes verifiable evidence to IPFS, and writes composable reputation feedback on-chain.

supportedTools.name: check_trust
supportedTools.description: Check trust score of an ERC-8004 registered agent

autonomousLoop.discover: Sweep Identity Registry for new/unscored agents
autonomousLoop.analyze: Fetch wallet history from Base + Ethereum, run 5-dimensional scoring
autonomousLoop.score: Weighted aggregation with sybil penalties and trust decay
autonomousLoop.publish: Pin evidence to IPFS, write feedback to Reputation Registry
autonomousLoop.repeat: Every 30 minutes, re-discover and re-score stale agents

safetyGuardrails: Nonce lock prevents concurrent transaction conflicts
Gas limits capped at 300,000 per transaction
ETH balance check before staking operations
Graceful fallback when ETH RPC is unavailable
